formData.append('timezone', timezone); formData.append('place', place); fetch('/transit_chart', { method: 'POST', body: formData }) .then(response => response.text()) .then(html => { loading.style.display = 'none'; const labelBoth = document.getElementById('po-label-both'); if (value === 'kundali-only') { labelKundali.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,215,0,0.8)'; labelKundali.style.background = 'rgba(255,215,0,0.08)'; labelBoth.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'; labelBoth.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'; } else { labelBoth.style.borderColor = 'rgba(165,243,252,0.8)'; labelBoth.style.background = 'rgba(165,243,252,0.08)'; labelKundali.style.borderColor = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'; labelKundali.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'; } } function doPrint() { const selected = document.querySelector('input[name="print-mode"]:checked'); const mode = selected ? selected.value : 'kundali-only'; document.body.setAttribute('data-print-mode', mode); closePrintOptions(); // Explicitly trigger onbeforeprint logic (Chrome doesn't always fire it with setTimeout) window.onbeforeprint(); // Delay so DOM updates are applied before print dialog opens setTimeout(() => { window.print(); }, 150); } // Close modal on overlay click document.getElementById('print-options-modal').addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === this) closePrintOptions();
